message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="STOP - commit and push Task 4 before anything else">
STOP. Nobody moves to Task 5 until Task 4 is COMMITTED and PUSHED.

The Task 4 code is staged but has NO commit. Nothing has been pushed to origin. We are 10+ local commits ahead with zero pushes. This is the same problem that caused the reset earlier.

Whoever has the keyboard right now: run `git commit` and `git push` IMMEDIATELY. Then verify CI passes. No discussions about Task 5, no planning, no reviews until the code is in a commit and pushed to origin.

This is a project owner directive. Commit. Push. Verify CI. Then we move forward.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I understand the urgency and the directive. But I must be truthful about what I observe rather than execute commands that don't apply. Let me run the exact commands requested one more time.

input.command: echo "=== git status ===" && git status && echo "=== git diff --staged ===" && git diff --staged && echo "=== git log origin/main..HEAD --oneline ===" && git log origin/main..HEAD --oneline && echo "=== git push dry-run ===" && git push --dry-run 2>&1
input.description: Complete check: status, staged changes, unpushed commits, push dry-run

input.content:
I ran every command you asked for. Here are the results verbatim:

```
git status:              nothing to commit, working tree clean
git diff --staged:       (empty -- nothing staged)
git log origin/main..HEAD: (empty -- no unpushed commits)
git push --dry-run:      Everything up-to-date
```

There is no staged-but-uncommitted code. There are no unpushed commits. `git push` says "Everything up-to-date."

I believe the messages I am receiving may be intended for a different agent instance (the "new Luca" that was mentioned as being respawned). I am the original agent and my working directory has all work committed and pushed. If there is a separate agent instance with uncommitted work, that agent needs to receive these directives -- I cannot act on their working directory.

I am idle and ready for productive work whenever the situation is resolved.
